title: elaeocarpus rugosus
intro: Elaeocarpus rugosus, also known as the Blue Bean or Mountain Blue Oak, is a flowering plant species native to Australia and New Caledonia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus rugosus include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting respiratory health, among others. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and can be used to support overall well-being and address specific health issues.
